description: Overview of all numeric PostgreSQL settings using the settings_num metric. Each setting is a separate time series with the setting name as a label, eliminating the cardinality explosion of the legacy 'settings' metric.

panels.description: Integer encoding of PG version, e.g. 160005 = 16.5
panels.title: Server Version Num

panels.description: In kB. Per sort / hash operation.
panels.title: Work Mem

panels.description: In kB. Used by VACUUM, CREATE INDEX, etc.
panels.title: Maintenance Work Mem

panels.description: In 8 kB blocks. Planner estimate of OS + PG cache.
panels.title: Effective Cache Size

panels.description: Fraction of table size triggering VACUUM
panels.title: AV Vacuum Scale Factor

panels.description: Fraction of table size triggering ANALYZE
panels.title: AV Analyze Scale Factor

panels.description: Fraction of checkpoint_timeout to spread I/O over
panels.title: Checkpoint Completion Target

panels.description: All numeric PostgreSQL settings collected by settings_num. Each row is one setting; name is a Prometheus label.
panels.title: All Settings (current snapshot)

panels.description: Settings whose value changed at least once in the selected time range. Uses Prometheus changes() function.
panels.title: Settings Changed in Time Range

panels.description: History of a single setting value over time. Use the $setting variable to select which setting to inspect.
panels.title: Setting Value Over Time: $setting

title: Settings Overview
